scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,billing,mesero,receptor,recepcion -c blue,yellow,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w mesero-server" "npm run dev -w facturacion-server" "npm run dev -w mesero-ia" "npm run dev -w receptor-pedidos" "npm run dev -w recepcion-ia"
scripts.build: npm run build -w mesero-server && npm run build -w mesero-ia && npm run build -w receptor-pedidos && npm run build -w recepcion-ia
scripts.test: npm run test -w mesero-server && npm run test -w mesero-ia
